impact: Evidence event taxonomy remains duplicated across parallel maps/switches; central schema refactor would reduce drift risk.
resolution: Extended the centralized evidenceEventSchema with per-event linkage requirements and changed evidence linkage validation to use those schema declarations instead of an event-type switch. The taxonomy schema now owns category, summary code, allowed statuses, metadata values, and linkage requirements. Event ID shape validation remains separate because it is behavior-specific and depends on event fields/opaque ID formats.
title: [maintainability] Evidence event taxonomy remains duplicated across parallel maps/switches; centra
